ham.subject: Standard Bank: Transaction Alert – $250.00 Debit from ABC Store
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

This is a notification from Standard Bank regarding a recent transaction on your account ending in 1234.

• Date: 2026-04-14
• Amount: $250.00
• Merchant: ABC Store
• Location: New York, NY

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact Standard Bank immediately at 1-800-555-1234 or visit your nearest branch.

Thank you for banking with Standard Bank.

Sincerely,

Standard Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Package Delivery Failed – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #123456789) could not be delivered due to missing recipient. To avoid additional missed delivery fees, please verify your delivery address within 48 hours. Failure to do so will result in a $50 missed delivery fee and potential account suspension.

Click <URL> to resolve this issue immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,

FedEx Customer Support
